title: How to Reset Your Active Directory / SSO Password
text:
Q: How do I reset my Active Directory / SSO password?
A: Windows: Step 1: Press Ctrl + Alt + Delete on your keyboard and select 'Change a password'. Step 2: Enter your old password, then type your new password twice to confirm. Step 3: Click the arrow or press Enter to complete the process. Alternatively, you can use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login screen if available. macOS: Step 1: Open 'System Preferences' and click on 'Users & Groups'. Step 2: Click on your account and then select 'Reset Password'. Step 3: Enter your old password, then type your new password twice to confirm. Step 4: Click 'Change Password' to finalize the reset. If you are unable to reset your password through these methods, please contact the IT helpdesk for further assistance.
